_comment: Maps a #harbour-feedback app slug (from the widget's *[slug]* tag or a human post's heading/path) to where its LIVE code lives and how it deploys. The routine branches in `repo`, edits `live_source`, and quotes `deploy` in the PR. Slugs not listed are resolved with `resolution_rules` below — and should be appended here once confirmed.

vertigo-vault.deploy: cd apps/vertigo-vault && npx opennextjs-cloudflare build && node ../../packages/security/scripts/write-assets-headers.mjs /harbour/vertigo-vault && npx opennextjs-cloudflare deploy

lines-become-loops.note: index.html, simulator.html, lakeshore-simulator.html, facilitator.html. Session API runs on wv-site at app/portfolio/assets/lines-become-loops/api/session/*.

read-the-room.note: worker wv-harbour-read-the-room; static HTML + Room Durable Object (src/room.ts).

co-rubric-companion.deploy: cd apps/harbour/rubric-co-builder-companion && npx opennextjs-cloudflare build && npx opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
co-rubric-companion.note: worker wv-harbour-rcb-companion. The route /harbour/co-rubric maps to a separate worker wv-harbour-rubric-co-builder at apps/harbour/rubric-co-builder.

co-rubric.deploy: cd apps/harbour/rubric-co-builder && npx opennextjs-cloudflare build && npx opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
co-rubric.note: worker wv-harbour-rubric-co-builder. maria's 2026-05-27 feedback was for the *companion* (co-rubric-companion).

harbour-preview.deploy: site project build (Next route + public/harbour-preview assets)

depth-chart.deploy: cd apps/depth-chart && npx opennextjs-cloudflare build && node ../../packages/security/scripts/write-assets-headers.mjs /harbour/depth-chart && npx opennextjs-cloudflare deploy

harbour.deploy: cd apps/harbour && npx opennextjs-cloudflare build && node ../../packages/security/scripts/write-assets-headers.mjs /harbour && npx opennextjs-cloudflare deploy

unresolved.regenerative-practices-catalogue: Live source not yet confirmed — resolve from windedvertigo/site/next.config.ts rewrites before editing, then add here.

resolution_rules: 1. Open windedvertigo/site/next.config.ts. Find the rewrite/redirect for /harbour/<slug>.
2. If it points at a local public/ path (e.g. /harbour/<slug>/index.html) → static-site, edit windedvertigo/site/public/harbour/<slug>/, deploy = site project build.

3. If it points at a *.workers.dev worker → find the worker dir (grep the worker name in windedvertigo/apps/harbour/*/wrangler.jsonc, then harbour-apps/apps/*/wrangler.jsonc). Edit there; deploy = opennextjs-cloudflare build+deploy (or wrangler deploy for plain workers).
4. If it's an app/ route in the site repo (e.g. app/harbour-preview) → site-route, deploy = site project build.
5. The 11 threshold-concept apps + paper-trail/raft-house/tidal-pool/mirror-log/orbit-lab/etc. live at harbour-apps/apps/<slug> as CF workers (wv-harbour-<slug>).
6. Always confirm the file exists before editing; append the confirmed mapping to `apps` so the next run is faster.
